Which rule best describes how the labels were assigned?

A) The input its first word comes before its second word in alphabetical order
B) The input starts with an adjective
C) The second word is a plural noun
D) The first two words start with the same letter
E) The input contains a digit
F) The first word's initial letter is in the first half of the alphabet
G) The first two words start with adjacent letters of the alphabet
H) The first word is shorter than the second word

Answer with the single letter of the best option.
